# begin crush map
tunable choose_local_tries 0
tunable choose_local_fallback_tries 0
tunable choose_total_tries 50
tunable chooseleaf_descend_once 1
tunable chooseleaf_vary_r 1
tunable chooseleaf_stable 1
tunable straw_calc_version 1
tunable allowed_bucket_algs 54

# devices
device 0 osd.0 class hdd
device 1 osd.1 class hdd
device 2 osd.2 class hdd
device 3 osd.3 class hdd
device 4 osd.4 class hdd
device 5 osd.5 class hdd
device 6 osd.6 class hdd
device 7 osd.7 class hdd
device 8 osd.8 class hdd
device 9 osd.9 class hdd
device 10 osd.10 class hdd
device 11 osd.11 class hdd
device 12 osd.12 class hdd
device 13 osd.13 class hdd
device 14 osd.14 class hdd
device 15 osd.15 class hdd
device 16 osd.16 class hdd
device 17 osd.17 class hdd
device 18 osd.18 class hdd
device 19 osd.19 class hdd
device 20 osd.20 class hdd
device 21 osd.21 class hdd
device 22 osd.22 class hdd
device 23 osd.23 class hdd
device 24 osd.24 class hdd
device 25 osd.25 class hdd
device 26 osd.26 class hdd
device 27 osd.27 class hdd
device 28 osd.28 class hdd
device 29 osd.29 class hdd
device 30 osd.30 class hdd
device 31 osd.31 class hdd
device 32 osd.32 class hdd
device 33 osd.33 class hdd
device 34 osd.34 class ssd
device 35 osd.35 class ssd
device 36 osd.36 class ssd
device 37 osd.37 class ssd
device 38 osd.38 class ssd

# types
type 0 osd
type 1 host
type 2 chassis
type 3 rack
type 4 row
type 5 pdu
type 6 pod
type 7 room
type 8 datacenter
type 9 zone
type 10 region
type 11 root

# buckets
host compute02 {
	id -3		# do not change unnecessarily
	id -4 class hdd		# do not change unnecessarily
	id -7 class ssd		# do not change unnecessarily
	# weight 37.10397
	alg straw2
	hash 0	# rjenkins1
	item osd.16 weight 2.18259
	item osd.18 weight 2.18259
	item osd.30 weight 2.18259
	item osd.5 weight 2.18259
	item osd.8 weight 2.18259
	item osd.26 weight 2.18259
	item osd.10 weight 2.18259
	item osd.1 weight 2.18259
	item osd.12 weight 2.18259
	item osd.14 weight 2.18259
	item osd.20 weight 2.18259
	item osd.3 weight 2.18259
	item osd.32 weight 2.18259
	item osd.28 weight 2.18259
	item osd.6 weight 2.18259
	item osd.24 weight 2.18259
	item osd.22 weight 2.18259
}
host compute03 {
	id -5		# do not change unnecessarily
	id -6 class hdd		# do not change unnecessarily
	id -8 class ssd		# do not change unnecessarily
	# weight 37.10397
	alg straw2
	hash 0	# rjenkins1
	item osd.25 weight 2.18259
	item osd.9 weight 2.18259
	item osd.33 weight 2.18259
	item osd.4 weight 2.18259
	item osd.2 weight 2.18259
	item osd.11 weight 2.18259
	item osd.21 weight 2.18259
	item osd.17 weight 2.18259
	item osd.0 weight 2.18259
	item osd.7 weight 2.18259
	item osd.13 weight 2.18259
	item osd.29 weight 2.18259
	item osd.27 weight 2.18259
	item osd.23 weight 2.18259
	item osd.31 weight 2.18259
	item osd.15 weight 2.18259
	item osd.19 weight 2.18259
}
host compute01 {
	id -10		# do not change unnecessarily
	id -11 class hdd		# do not change unnecessarily
	id -12 class ssd		# do not change unnecessarily
	# weight 34.93149
	alg straw2
	hash 0	# rjenkins1
	item osd.35 weight 6.98630
	item osd.36 weight 6.98630
	item osd.34 weight 6.98630
	item osd.38 weight 6.98630
	item osd.37 weight 6.98630
}
root default {
	id -1		# do not change unnecessarily
	id -2 class hdd		# do not change unnecessarily
	id -9 class ssd		# do not change unnecessarily
	# weight 109.13943
	alg straw2
	hash 0	# rjenkins1
	item compute02 weight 37.10397
	item compute03 weight 37.10397
	item compute01 weight 34.93149
}

# rules
rule replicated_rule {
	id 0
	type replicated
	step take default
	step chooseleaf firstn 0 type host
	step emit
}
rule hdd_rule {
	id 1
	type replicated
	step take default class hdd
	step chooseleaf firstn 0 type host
	step emit
}
rule ssd_rule {
	id 2
	type replicated
	step take default class ssd
	step chooseleaf firstn 0 type host
	step emit
}
rule replicated_rule_single_host {
	id 3
	type replicated
	step take default
	step choose firstn 0 type osd
	step emit
}

# end crush map
